appraisal_events.evidence: « Robert de Saint-Loup avait cent fois raison... peut avoir eu une fois tort. » et le rappel: « De cette façon, j'ai barre sur elle. »
appraisal_events.explanation: The narrator concedes a specific fault: Robert had sought leverage over her with the necklace, partially validating the charge of manipulation and locally lowering his moral standing.

status_effects.explanation: The narrator’s acknowledgment that Robert aimed to have a 'hold' over her slightly diminishes his local evaluation despite broader claims that he was usually in the right.
